name: OpenAI Codex
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only Transformer (GPT-3 fine-tuned on code)
note: GPT-3 fine-tuned on GitHub code; powered the original GitHub Copilot and introduced the HumanEval benchmark; Codex API discontinued 2023-03-23.
verificationNotes: Confirmed via arXiv 2107.03374: 12B-parameter model, HumanEval pass@1 28.8% matches the paper exactly. Codex API shutdown confirmed for 2023-03-23 (Simon Willison/HN coverage of OpenAI's 3-day-notice discontinuation), matching the record. Launch alongside GitHub Copilot in August 2021 confirmed. No changes made.
